action_recommended: Re-run analyst assessment if fresh evaluation needed. Current verdict may be more recent and correct; old assessment not integrated.
schema_fix_note: Added status:"pending" + recommended_lane:"analyst-mode-1b" so Mode 2b dispatcher can classify these correctly. decider-stale-skip writer was producing items with resolved:false but no status field, causing schema-nonconforming dispatcher behavior. Items are prediction re-assessment work (Mode 1b semantics), NOT pipeline-issue items (Mode 2b semantics). Long-term fix: tinker directive to update decider-stale-skip writer schema.
